name: Racing: Storm Chase
short_description: This is a car racing as the core of the game, driving different cars, experience unlimited driving fun. Challenge the thrilling track, but also with friends to play two, experience the thrilling chase game!
detailed_description:
🚗 LUXURY CARS & CUSTOMIZATION
Unlock unique vehicles with special traits! Custom paintjobs and performance upgrades will build your ultimate ride.

🏁 STRATEGY & CIRCUITS
Each car has pros and cons. Analyze track terrain, choose the perfect vehicle, and outsmart rivals with tactical brilliance!

🎮 SKILLS & POWER-UPS
Master drifting, nitro bursts... Show off your driving artistry! Discover hidden shortcuts and time your boosts for epic comebacks!

👥 LOCAL VS GLOBAL
Turn your living room into a racetrack! 2-player split-screen battles. Dominate global leaderboards and prove your lap time is UNBEATABLE!

⭐ JOIN THE LEGACY
New cars, tracks and modes coming! Start your engine now – will YOU be the first to claim the World Champion title?

supported_languages: English, Japanese, Simplified Chinese, Traditional Chinese, Korean, French, Russian
